ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used by the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the package */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the package belongs */,
  "tag_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tag IDs for the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was last updated */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the package's code repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the package */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who maintains the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that depends on another package */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., import, inherit) */,
  "version_range" TEXT /* Version range of the dependency */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is optional */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_dependencies_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that contains the import */,
  "import_name" TEXT /* Name of the import (e.g., method, class) */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., function, variable) */,
  "source_file" TEXT /* File where the import is located */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number of the import in the source file */,
  "used_in_methods" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of methods where the import is used */,
  "used_in_classes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of classes where the import is used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_imports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that contains the method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method (e.g., public, private) */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of method parameters */,
  "docstring" TEXT /* Documentation string for the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_methods_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that contains the class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., abstract, concrete) */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of class attributes */,
  "methods" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of class methods */,
  "docstring" TEXT /* Documentation string for the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_packages" (
  "project_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-package relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that uses the package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being used */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package used in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was added to the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was last updated in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_heaviness" (
  "heaviness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heaviness metric */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being measured */,
  "heaviness_score" REAL /* Heaviness score of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the heaviness metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the heaviness metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heaviness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_heaviness_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage metric */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the package is used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_usage_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
